title: In Memory of Colleagues and Friends
summary: The Belfer Center remembers former colleague Elizabeth S. Rogers and Thomas C. Schelling
body: (Martha Stewart) (Courtesy of the Rogers family) Recommended citation "In Memory of Colleagues and Friends." Belfer Center Newsletter, Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs, Harvard Kennedy School (Summer 2017). _list.source: Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs, Harvard Kennedy School

result.main_content_en: The article is a memorial tribute from the Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs at Harvard Kennedy School, published in its Summer 2017 newsletter. It honors the memory of colleagues and friends associated with the Center, specifically mentioning Elizabeth S. Rogers. The piece falls under the International Security Program and serves as an acknowledgment of their contributions and the loss felt by the community. It is a reflective piece typical of organizational remembrances, focusing on personal and professional legacy within the context of science and international affairs.
result.main_content_zh: 本文是哈佛大学肯尼迪学院贝尔弗科学与国际事务中心于2017年夏季通讯中发表的一篇纪念文章。文章悼念了与中心相关的同事和友人，特别提到了伊丽莎白·S·罗杰斯。此文隶属于国际安全项目，旨在缅怀逝者对该中心的贡献以及他们离去给社区带来的损失。这是一篇典型的机构纪念性文字，在科学与国际事务的背景下，反思了逝者的个人与专业遗产。
